pillar_metadata.name: Integrity
pillar_metadata.description: Internal consistency and alignment with core values; the coherence of identity across time.

state_restoration.impact: Pulls the entity back to its core identity, preventing corruption or drift.

weight_calculation.impact: Increases systemic dependency by proving reliability and consistency.

fragmentation.result: The unit loses its identity; internal components act in contradiction to the whole.

brittleness.result: The system is too rigid to adapt; it shatters under stress rather than transforming.
